mapper.select: SELECT s.id AS shopId, s.shop_code AS shopCode, s.floor_id AS floorId, s.building_id AS buildingId, s.project_id AS projectId, s.shop_type AS shopType, s.plan_format AS planFormat, s.rent_area AS rentArea, s.actual_area AS actualArea, s.shop_status AS shopStatus FROM biz_shop s WHERE s.floor_id = #{floorId} AND s.is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY s.shop_code
